mapper.select: select second_comment_id ,user_id ,first_comment_id ,text ,respond_username ,like_amount ,create_time ,is_exist from Second_Comment where first_comment_id=#{firstCommentId} and is_exist=1 order by like_amount limit #{from},#{need}
mapper.update: update Second_Comment set is_exist=0 where second_comment_id=#{secondCommentId} and is_exist=1 and user_id=#{userId}
mapper.select: select first_comment_id from Second_Comment where second_comment_id=#{secondCommentId} and is_exist=1 and user_id=#{userId}
